title: Senior Software Engineer - Sasken Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Sasken Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
